description: Style NoteThere's nothing a girl loves more than sparkling jewellery in all shapes and sizes, and the bigger and shinier, the better! Here in myntra, we're proud to bring you ethnic inspired jewellery from fabindia. Pair these earings up with a fancy kurta or skirt from Fabindia and create your own personal fashion identity.Product DetailsSilver fish hook earrings with black and white stone embellishmentsMaterial and CareSilverWipe with dry clothSize Length: 3.6 cm
